description: Use this API to specify or return the status of a GNE device. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = gnestatus(name, ival) ierr, ival = gnestatus(name)
python_syntax: ierr = gnestatus(name, ival) ierr, ival = gnestatus(name)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the gne device for which the status is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the status of the specified gne device. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, no default allowed; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
